title: Conserving Water and Heat Management
immediate_steps: Travel only during the cool hours of the early morning or night
Rest in deep shade during the heat of the day (build a shade tarp if necessary)
Keep all your clothes on, including long sleeves and a hat, to slow sweat evaporation and prevent sunburn
Breathe through your nose, not your mouth, to reduce moisture loss
If you find water, drink it (do not ration it to the point of dehydration)
avoid: Do not walk during the peak heat (10 AM to 4 PM)
Do not remove your shirt (sunburn increases fluid loss)
Do not eat food if you are out of water (digestion uses body water)
Do not drink urine (it contains toxins that accelerate dehydration)
